name: Air Jordan 1 High
description: The shoe that started it all. High-cut silhouette with premium leather overlays.

name: Air Force 1 '07
description: The crisp white-on-white classic that never goes out of style.

name: 9060 Rain Cloud
description: Futuristic design meets classic 99X heritage for ultimate comfort.

name: Chuck Taylor All Star High
description: The timeless classic. Canvas upper with rubber toe cap and iconic ankle patch. A cultural icon for over 100 years.

name: Air Max 90
description: The Air Max 90 stays true to its OG running roots with the iconic Waffle outsole, stitched overlays and classic TPU accents.

name: Stan Smith
description: The iconic tennis shoe turned street style staple. Clean leather upper with signature perforated 3-Stripes.

name: Dunk Low
description: Created for the hardwood but taken to the streets. The Nike Dunk Low returns with crisp overlays and classic colour blocking.

name: Yeezy Boost 350 V2
description: Kanye West and Adidas collaboration. Primeknit upper with Boost cushioning and distinctive side stripe.

name: Air Force 1 Shadow
description: Double the height, double the style. The AF1 Shadow builds on the classic with layered design elements for a bold look.

name: 990v5
description: Made in USA. Premium suede and mesh upper with ENCAP midsole technology. The pinnacle of New Balance craftsmanship.

name: Sk8-Hi
description: The original high-top skate shoe. Canvas and suede upper with padded collar for ankle support and iconic side stripe.

name: Air Jordan 4 Retro
description: Michael Jordan wore the 4s when he hit the famous free throw line dunk. Mesh panels and visible Air unit make it iconic.
